name: New Value AG
summary: New Value AG is no longer investing. New Value AG is a private equity and venture capital firm specializing in growth capital in the form of equity and/or quasi equity instruments. The firm seeks to invest in mid venture, late venture, middle market, expansion phase, and pre IPO stages in small and medium-sized enterprises. It does not invest in biotechnology. It primarily invests in private and listed companies in the high-tech, low-tech, cleantech, medtech, and healthcare sector with a focus on medical testing, analyzing, and diagnostic equipment. The firm seeks to invest in companies based in Switzerland and the German-speaking region including Germany and Austria. It invests between CHF 1 million ($0.94 million) to CHF 5 million ($4.71 million) in its portfolio companies. It prefers to hold minority stakes investing a maximum of 20 percent of overall portfolio in any individual investment, mainly in the form of equity. The firm seeks to co-invest with other private equity investors. It seeks to exit its investments through an IPO or sale within three to seven years. New Value AG was founded in 2000 and is based in Baar, Switzerland.
